title: Packaging margins squeezed by war-driven inflation
snippet: Fastmarkets noted in its 2026 packaging ... supply chain strategies. When costs rise quickly but selling prices lag, packaging margins tighten even before demand weakens. Margin pressure is showing first in plastics and flexible packaging because these formats are closely linked to polymer markets.
